title: Bigger Frogs
description: Feed frogs and watch them grow.
body:
# What is this plugin?
It's a simple plugin that lets you make frogs bigger by feeding them. Don't feed them too much through as they might explode.

# Features
- Lets players feed frogs to increase their size.

The current version of the plugin was intentionally kept simple to reduce the likelihood of it breaking between different Minecraft versions.

# Setup:
- Download the jar file.
- Place the file into your server's plugin folder.
- Start the server and Enjoy!

### Tested + Working Versions:
  - ✅ Tested on 1.21.1

## Stats (For the latest version):
https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/Bigger%20Frogs
